message:
feat(daemon): integrate DHCP server lifecycle

Wire the DHCP server into the daemon for automatic IP allocation to VMs:
- Initialize DHCP server in New() with config from Firecracker settings
- Start DHCP server in Start() after base image setup (non-blocking on failure)
- Stop DHCP server gracefully in Stop()
- Add DHCP() accessor for components that need lease lookups

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
